Vocabulary - मनसः सुस्थितिः | Story 23

05 Jun 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
तदीयम् his
आवृत surrounded
केचन some
शिरस् head
कण्डुयन itching
व्यापृत occupied
आहूय having called
ज्या bowstring
योजित attached /
put together
ननु no doubt
अविदितम् without the knowledge of /
unknown
सम्पादनीय to be carried out or accomplished or effected
तावत्कालम् for so long a time
रक्षणीय to be ruled by /
to be guarded against or prevented or avoided
इदानीम् now

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
इदम् गृहम् तदीयम् This house is his
अपि इदम् तदीयम्? Is this his?
   
केचन न समर्थाः Some are not efficient.
केचन जनाः स्वार्थिनः Some people are selfish.
   
शिरसि तैलसमुक्षणं करोतु Please apply oil to my head.
   
लावण्या चमसमितां शर्करां जलेन योजितवती Lavanya mixed a spoonful of sugar with the water.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
